content_of_post_to_comment:
Hi, I use Twitter (X) since 2024~2025 I wasn't as active as I am now.

I wake up I need absolutely to check my account to see if I have any interaction ; comments, likes, rt
I want it to stop, because of Twitter I've been very anxious lately because I'm scared to not having any notifications from Twitter.

As soon as my account is being quiet without any recent post on my account or any notifications it's irritating, frustrating I feel ignored. And I immediately post something to at least get one like or anything else. Because of this kind of bad habits I'm very active even if I only have 2k post on my account, I tweet very often sometimes at every one hour.

I know that posting very much on Twitter is kind of normal and I know that many other account have more than 50k tweets. But in my case being this active and chronically online is just not good for me. I know to put a limit with Instagram TikTok Facebook etc but not with Twitter. I crave and I seek Twitter attention. Even if it's hate, i don't care i want something from Twitter.

But the weirdest thing is ; that I have to account and I have this problem ONLY with one account. On my main I account I literally post without excepting any like or comments, but with my second account their is this problem : wanting the absolute attention.

If it can help y'all : on my main account I have many likes very easily, I have the attention I'm looking for. But on my second account it's very messy I have many hit tweets but not on the tweets that I want to have an hit tweet. My second account makes me very bad sad and angry I sometimes think about deleting it but it's too hard. I disconnect everytime after posting something but it doesn't really work either.
